title: Google Business Profile Scraper Input
description: Scrape GBP listings by city+niche, search queries, or direct place URLs. Quick mode for fast card data, Deep mode for full 62+ field extraction.

scrapeMode.title: Scrape Mode
scrapeMode.description: Quick: extracts 13 fields per business from search results (fast, cheap). Deep: visits each profile for full 62+ fields including reviews, posts, photos, attributes.
enumTitles: Deep scrape (all 62+ fields — visits each profile)

city.title: City
city.description: Select a city. The scraper auto-expands into all areas/neighborhoods for comprehensive coverage. Use with Business Type.

businessType.title: Business Type / Niche
businessType.description: Type of business to search (e.g., dentist, restaurant, hotel, gym, salon). Required when City is set.

searchQueries.title: Search Queries
searchQueries.description: Google Maps search queries (e.g., 'restaurants in Austin, TX'). Alternative to city+businessType.

placeUrls.title: Place URLs (Direct)
placeUrls.description: Direct Google Maps place URLs. Always uses deep scrape mode.

maxResults.title: Max Results Per Search
maxResults.description: Maximum listings per search query / area.

deepScrape.title: Deep Scrape (Reviews, Photos, Posts)
deepScrape.description: In deep mode: enables full review loading, photo gallery, posts pagination. Slower but complete.

debugSelectors.title: Debug Selectors
debugSelectors.description: Run selector health audit and save report to key-value store.

maxConcurrency.title: Max Concurrency
maxConcurrency.description: Pages open in parallel. Higher = faster but more memory. With 32GB RAM, 10-15 is safe. Lower = less bot detection risk.
